## Example <code>"seroincidence.by"</code> object {.unnumbered}


### Description

Typhoid seroconversion rate estimates by country and age category
from the SEES study.



### Usage

<pre><code class='language-R'>sees_typhoid_ests_strat
</code></pre>


### Format

An object of class <code>seroincidence.by</code> (inherits from <code>list</code>) of length 9.



### Source

<code>serocalculator/data-raw/sees_typhoid_ests_strat.R</code>
